nl_query: For each department, show the department name, number of courses, number of faculty members, number of active boards, number of scripts currently in evaluation, and the average marks awarded per script.
failed_sql:
SELECT au.name AS academic_unit_name, COUNT(DISTINCT au.id) AS num_courses, COUNT(DISTINCT fc.id) AS num_faculty_members, COUNT(DISTINCT b.id) AS num_active_boards, COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) AS num_scripts_in_evaluation, AVG(em.marks_awarded) AS avg_evaluation_marks_per_script
FROM   academic_unit au
JOIN   academic_unit_closure c ON c.ancestor_id = au.id
JOIN   academic_unit course ON course.id = c.descendant_id
JOIN   faculty_cache fc ON fc.department_id = au.id
JOIN   board b ON b.course_id = au.id
JOIN   script_assignment sa ON sa.board_id = b.id
JOIN   evaluation_attempt ea ON ea.assignment_id = sa.id AND ea.is_active = TRUE
JOIN   evaluation_marks em ON em.attempt_id = ea.id
WHERE  au.unit_type = 'COURSE'
GROUP  BY au.name
ORDER  BY num_courses DESC;
error: Validation failed (aggregation): GROUP BY uses a descriptive column (like name, title, or code) without including the primary key (id). Names and titles may not be unique. Always include the entity's 'id' column in the GROUP BY clause alongside the descriptive column.
